# acceptDatabaseTransfer

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for acceptDatabaseTransfer

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useAcceptDatabaseTransferMutation(); mutate({ input: { transferId: '<UUID>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useAcceptDatabaseTransferMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useAcceptDatabaseTransferMutation();
mutate({ input: { transferId: '<UUID>' } });
```
